info.name: URL Shortener API - Latest Runner Safe
info.description:
Runner-safe Postman collection for the FastAPI URL Shortener API. Updated for expires_at, is_active, description, custom_code, QR, redirect, analytics, refresh rotation, logout, and negative checks.

Recommended: run from top to bottom. Redirect requests are set to not follow redirects where possible so 302 can be inspected.

request.description: Creates a unique user for this runner execution.

exec: pm.test('Response contains email and no password', function () {

request.description: Logs in and stores access_token and refresh_token.

exec: pm.test('Save access and refresh tokens', function () {

request.description: Rotates refresh token and stores new access/refresh tokens.
Creates a normal active link with future expires_at and description.

exec: pm.test('Save short code and short_url', function () {

request.description: Returns authenticated user's links.
Returns details for the saved short code.
Returns a PNG QR code for the saved short link.

exec: pm.test('QR response body is not empty', function () {

request.description: Public redirect endpoint for active/non-expired link. This request disables automatic redirect following when Postman honors protocolProfileBehavior.

exec: pm.test('Redirect returns 302 or final target 200 depending on Postman settings', function () {
pm.test('Location header points to original_url', function () {

request.description: Returns dashboard-level analytics for authenticated user.
Returns analytics for saved short code.
Returns paginated click logs for saved short code.
Updates original URL for saved short code.

item.name: Feature Checks - Expiration / Active / Custom Code

request.description: Creates a link with is_active=false.
Checks redirect is blocked when is_active=false. Current app code returns 400.
Creates a link that will expire very soon. The next request waits before redirecting.
Waits about 16 seconds, then checks redirect is blocked after expires_at. Current app code returns 400.
Creates a link with a valid custom_code.
Checks duplicate custom_code is rejected.
Checks schema-level custom_code validation.
Checks reserved custom_code that passes schema but is blocked by service.
Checks reserved code that fails schema first because it is shorter than 5 chars.

item.name: 22 - Past expires_at on Create - Should Return 422

request.description: Checks create validation rejects past expires_at.

item.name: 23 - is_active null on Create - Should Return 422

request.description: Checks is_active is a real boolean and null is rejected.
Creates a link without expires_at. This should work if redirect service handles expires_at=None safely.
Checks links with expires_at=null can still redirect. If this fails with 500, add `if link.expires_at is not None` before comparing dates.

exec: pm.test('Redirect works for no-expiry link', function () {

request.description: Checks that non-existing link code returns 404.

item.name: 27 - Get Links Without Token - Should Return 401

request.description: Checks protected link listing requires authentication.
Checks analytics requires authentication.
Deletes code if it exists. Allows 204/404 so cleanup does not break the runner.
Deletes inactive_code if it exists. Allows 204/404 so cleanup does not break the runner.
Deletes expiring_code if it exists. Allows 204/404 so cleanup does not break the runner.
Deletes custom_code if it exists. Allows 204/404 so cleanup does not break the runner.
Deletes no_expiry_code if it exists. Allows 204/404 so cleanup does not break the runner.
Revokes current refresh token. Kept at the end.
